# Petrophysical Measurement

**Summary**: The measurement of physical properties of rocks, such as porosity and permeability.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-benaafi|Benaafi, 2017]] performed petrophysical measurements on 63 samples to determine impact on geomechanics.
